suppress.notes: CVE-2025-7962 - org.eclipse.angus:angus-activation:2.0.2 Transitive dependency from Spring Boot Jakarta EE compliance layer. EnderChest has no Jakarta Mail or email functionality; the vulnerable activation-handler code path (requires javax.mail / jakarta.mail on the call stack) is never reached. Reviewed: 2026-05-14 by Pedro Conceicao. Next review: 2027-05-14.

CVE-2023-52428 - com.nimbusds:nimbus-jose-jwt:9.24.4 The vulnerability is a DoS via CPU exhaustion when parsing a JWE header with ECDH key agreement algorithms. EnderChest is an OAuth2 Resource Server that validates JWS (signed) JWTs issued by Auth0. It does NOT process JWE (encrypted) tokens. Auth0 tokens use RS256/ES256 signature; the ECDH JWE parsing code path is never executed. The attack requires an attacker to inject a crafted JWE token, which Auth0 would never issue. Upgrading requires breaking out of the Spring Boot 3.2.5 BOM. Reviewed: 2026-05-14 by Pedro Conceicao. Next review: 2027-05-14.

CVE-2026-22740, CVE-2026-22741, CVE-2026-22745 - spring-core / spring-web 6.1.6 Spring Framework 6.1.6 is pinned by Spring Boot 3.2.5. These CVEs require Spring Framework 6.1.x to be upgraded, which is only possible by upgrading Spring Boot to 3.4.x or later. That upgrade is out of scope for Sprint 2. Tracked as a known gap: upgrade Spring Boot to 3.4.x in a future sprint. Reviewed: 2026-05-14 by Pedro Conceicao. Next review: 2026-08-14.
See spring-core CVE-2026-22740 suppression above for full rationale.
See spring-core CVE-2026-22740 suppression above for full rationale.
See spring-core CVE-2026-22740 suppression above for full rationale.
See spring-core CVE-2026-22740 suppression above for full rationale.
See spring-core CVE-2026-22740 suppression above for full rationale.

CVE-2026-41238 - spring-web 6.1.6 Spring Framework 6.1.6 is pinned by Spring Boot 3.2.5. Fix requires Spring Boot upgrade to 3.4.x or later (out of scope for Sprint 2). Reviewed: 2026-05-14 by Pedro Conceicao. Next review: 2026-08-14.

CVE-2025-48924 - org.apache.commons:commons-lang3:3.13.0 commons-lang3 is managed by Spring Boot 3.2.5 BOM. EnderChest uses commons-lang3 only through Spring internals (string utilities); no user- controlled input is passed through the vulnerable API surface. A fix requires either a Spring Boot upgrade or an explicit version override once a patched version is confirmed. Tracked for next sprint review. Reviewed: 2026-05-14 by Pedro Conceicao. Next review: 2026-08-14.

CVE-2025-15104 - org.hibernate.orm:hibernate-core:6.4.4.Final Hibernate 6.4.4.Final is managed by Spring Boot 3.2.5 BOM. EnderChest uses Hibernate only for JPA entity mapping with parameterised queries generated by Spring Data JPA; no raw HQL or native queries with user-supplied input are constructed. Fix requires Spring Boot upgrade. Tracked for next sprint. Reviewed: 2026-05-14 by Pedro Conceicao. Next review: 2026-08-14.
